items.title: BOG-7: Live board item population and sync acceptance
items.body:

## Board Fields

**Status:** Todo
**Faz:** F5 Projection Drift
**Track:** github-ops
**Priority:** P1
**Kind:** gate
**Owner repo:** Halildeu/autonomous-orchestrator
**Board:** autonomous-orchestrator Governance Board
**SSOT refs:**
- docs/OPERATIONS/BOARD-GOVERNANCE-ADOPTION-PLAN.v1.md#BOG-7
- docs/OPERATIONS/BOARD-LIVE-ITEM-SEED-EVIDENCE.v1.md

## Context

The governance ProjectV2 exists and field compatibility is OK, but it has no governed items. This issue tracks the real live seed/population gate so the board stops being an empty control surface without inventing completed historical work.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Required board labels exist on GitHub.
- [ ] This issue is created with the `project-roadmap`, `gate`, and `quality` labels.
- [ ] This issue is added to ProjectV2 `#5`.
- [ ] ProjectV2 fields match Status=Todo, Faz=F5 Projection Drift, Track=github-ops, Priority=P1, Kind=gate.
- [ ] Evidence references `.cache/reports/board_seed_apply_live.v1.json` and a post-apply item inventory.
- [ ] This evidence does not prove implementation completion, issue closure, or runtime/user-path acceptance.

## Evidence

### Source
- Pending

### Desired-state
- Pending

### Runtime/live
- Pending

### Browser/user-path
- Pending

### Does not prove
- Issue creation and ProjectV2 field population do not prove implementation completion or acceptance.

## Remaining

- Blocking: none for seed apply after digest acceptance.
- Non-blocking: live projection generator can be added after this seed gate.
- Deferred: issue closure and Done status remain out of scope.

## Next Action

Run the digest-gated board seed apply, then rerun ProjectV2 item inventory and board projection evidence.

## Related

- Tracked by future PRs only; do not use close keywords unless acceptance is complete.

## Safety Notes

No secrets, tokens, private URLs, issue close action, or Done automation are allowed in this item.
